title: Implement tick contract compiler for tickflow
description: Load tick data through tk show/list JSON and compile a TickContract containing id, title, description, acceptance_criteria, blocked_by, requires, maxAttempts, and verifier commands inferred from acceptance criteria. Add /tickflow-contract <id> output for inspection.
acceptance_criteria: Given a real tick with acceptance_criteria, /tickflow-contract <id> displays the contract and inferred verifier commands; handles missing acceptance criteria gracefully.
closed_reason: Implemented TickContract compilation from tk show JSON, acceptance criteria extraction, verifier inference from Run/backticked/prose patterns, and /tickflow-contract formatting.
